contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: LLM provider abstraction docs + roadmap (autopilot Phase 0)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot_transcript/pull/1
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/20
  
  Details:
  Phase 0 of the LLM provider abstraction + per-call usage-logging plan.
  
  Deliverables:
  - truesight_autopilot_transcript: AGENTS.md (cross-LLM doorway), SCHEMA.md (canonical JSON/JSONL shapes for meta.json, messages.jsonl, usage.jsonl, _daily_summary.json, INDEX.json), PROVIDERS.md (DeepSeek/BigModel/Kimi/Grok/Gemini catalog with last-verified pricing + quirks), ROADMAP.md (6-phase rollout, each individually revertable), README.md (entry point pointing at AGENTS.md).
  - truesight_autopilot: docs/LLM_PROVIDER_ROADMAP.md (internal mirror of the public roadmap with file-level migration plan), README.md Related section updated.
  
  Scope explicitly excludes any executable code change so the running production autopilot service (EC2 i-02c699d3d7efbdc82, systemd truesight-autopilot.service, plus the active QR-vision pipeline work in commits 16289ca/801c575/ff08826) is unaffected.
  
  Future phases land additively: Phase 1 adds app/llm/ alongside llm_client.py; Phase 2 makes LLMClient a delegating shim; Phase 3 wires usage-logging behind LLM_USAGE_LOG_ENABLED (default off); Phase 4 adds BigModelProvider as opt-in for the BIGMODEL_CN_API key just contributed; Phase 5 unifies Grok/Gemini under the ABC after the QR pipeline stabilizes; Phase 6 deletes legacy clients.
  
  PRs merged 2026-05-08:
  - TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot_transcript#1 (squash 6fa0dd3)
  - TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot#20 (squash 120f956)
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
